zh.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond是John Richmond和Van Veurne的女兒，於1284年出生。她於大約1316年與Nicholas Stapleton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1335年之後在英國越可爾德拉，埋葬在英國越可爾德拉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond是John Richmond和Van Veurne的女儿，于1284年出生。她于大约1316年与Nicholas Stapleton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1335年之后在英国越可爾德拉，埋葬在英国越可爾德拉。

nameMeanings.name: Richmond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Richmond (North Yorkshire). The placename was probably transferred after the Norman Conquest from any of numerous places in France named with Old French riche ‘mighty, strong’ + munt, mont ‘mountain, hill’. Richmond in southwest London received this name only in the reign of Henry VII, in honor of the king, who had been Earl of Richmond until he came to the throne, and is unlikely to be the source of this surname.
occasionally a variant of Richman , with excrescent -d. The two names were probably often confused.

variants.name: Richman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Richeman, either from an unrecorded Old English Rīcmann, or from a pet form of Richard + the hypocoristic suffix -man. The name was sometimes interchangeable with Rickman , especially in recent times.
English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English riche ‘rich, powerful’ + -man. Compare Rich .
English: perhaps a variant of   Richmond  , or vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond was born in 1284 as the daughter of John Richmond and Van Veurne. She married Nicholas Stapleton about 1316. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1335, in Drax, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Drax, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond est née en 1284, fille de John Richmond et Van Veurne. Elle a épousé Nicholas Stapleton environ 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1335, à Drax, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Drax, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond wurde 1284, als Tochter von John Richmond und Van Veurne geboren. Sie hat um 1316 Nicholas Stapleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1335 in Drax, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Drax, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond è nata il nel 1284 come figlia di John Richmond e Van Veurne. Lei sposato Nicholas Stapleton circa 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1335, nel Drax, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Drax, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmondは1284年にJohn RichmondとVan Veurneの娘として生まれた。約1316年にNicholas Stapletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1335年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアドラックスで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアドラックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond(은)는 1284년 John Richmond(와)과 Van Veurne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1316년 Nicholas Stapleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 이후 영국 요르크실르 드라스에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 드라스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond nasceu em 1284 filha de John Richmond e Van Veurne. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Stapleton aproximadamente 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1335, em Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond родилась в 1284 г. Её родителей звали John Richmond и Van Veurne. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Stapleton около 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1335 г. в местности дракс, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности дракс, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Isabella Richmond nació en 1284 como hija de John Richmond y Van Veurne. Se casó con Nicholas Stapleton aproximadamente 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1335, en Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Drax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
